2606.13148.title: TerraBench: Can Agents Reason Over Heterogeneous Earth-System Data?
2606.13148.paper_summary: Climate and environmental decision-making increasingly requires reasoning across heterogeneous inputs, including gridded physical data, satellite imagery, geospatial context, and simulator outputs. Weather and climate foundation models can forecast well, but do not reason interactively in language, while large language models (LLMs) reason in language but cannot operate directly on high-dimensional Earth-system data. As a result, real scientific workflows in Earth-science remain underserved. We introduce TerraBench, a benchmark for grounded Earth-science reasoning, built on TerraAgent, a ReAct-style executable framework that interleaves reasoning, tool calls, and observations to couple LLM planning with scientific tools for environmental retrieval, geospatial processing, simulation, and artifact-backed computation. TerraBench unifies analysis of Earth observation imagery, gridded data, GIS reasoning and simulation in a single executable interface, whereas prior benchmarks isolate these capabilities into narrow individual tasks. It is also the first in this space to pair process-level tool-use metrics with tolerance-aware numeric scoring. The benchmark comprises 403 extensive agentic tasks across three tracks (Fundamentals, Simulator-Grounded, and Document-Grounded Verification) and eight application domains with 24,500 verified execution steps. These results indicate that reliable Earth-science agents must go beyond tool access to coordinate heterogeneous workflows, parameterize tools precisely, and preserve artifact provenance.
2606.13148.paper_summary_zh: 氣候和環境決策越來越需要在異質輸入之間進行推理，包括網格化的物理數據、衛星影像、地理空間背景和模擬器輸出。氣象和氣候基礎模型能夠進行良好的預測，但無法以語言進行互動推理，而大型語言模型（LLMs）能夠以語言進行推理，但無法直接處理高維的地球系統數據。因此，地球科學中的真正科學工作流程仍然未得到充分服務。我們介紹了TerraBench，這是一個基於TerraAgent的基準，用於基於實證的地球科學推理，TerraAgent是一個ReAct風格的可執行框架，交織推理、工具調用和觀察，以將LLM規劃與環境檢索、地理空間處理、模擬和基於工件的計算的科學工具相結合。TerraBench統一了地球觀測影像、網格數據、GIS推理和模擬的分析，並在單一可執行界面中進行，而之前的基準將這些能力孤立為狹窄的個別任務。它也是這一領域中第一個將過程級工具使用指標與容忍度感知的數值評分相結合的基準。該基準包含403個廣泛的代理任務，分為三個軌道（基礎、模擬器基礎和文檔基礎驗證）和八個應用領域，擁有24,500個經過驗證的執行步驟。這些結果表明，可靠的地球科學代理必須超越工具訪問，以協調異質工作流程，精確參數化工具，並保留工件來源。
2606.13148.author: Dat Tien Nguyen et.al.
2606.13148.authors: Dat Tien Nguyen, Thao Nguyen, Fadillah Adamsyah Maani, Huy M. Le, Muhammad Umer Sheikh, Numan Saeed, Muhammad Haris Khan, Salman Khan
